## What this adds
<!-- A role, a skill, an archetype, or a fix. One or two lines. -->

## Type
- [ ] New role (agent)
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New archetype (preset)
- [ ] Fix / improvement to an existing one
- [ ] Docs / examples

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows the six-field anatomy (role · instructions · skills · tools · context · output)
- [ ] One job per role; least-privilege `tools`
- [ ] No hardcoded company/product/stack/path in the agent body (stack goes in the `Adapt:` line)
- [ ] Wired into `project-setup` (roster logic, archetype presets, and `project-lead` delegation if a build role)
- [ ] Plain language; short
